items.title: Serial killer who murdered eight women in Long Island town imprisoned for life
items.dek: In fiery exchange, judge sentenced him to three life sentences plus 25 years to life on four other charges, all running consecutively.
items.body: In fiery exchange, judge sentenced him to three life sentences plus 25 years to life on four other charges, all running consecutively.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Pentagon AI chief: Musk’s Grok chatbot used to launch thousands of missiles at Iran
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amaon founder Bezos says
items.dek: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.body: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.author: IriLine Desk
